About KOTT Software Private Limited

KOTT Software Private Limited is a well-established, ISO 9001:2015 certified, 100% EOU Company specializing in Offshore Software Development and Enterprise Product Development since 1997. We serve a dedicated global clientele and are recognized for delivering robust, client-focused business solutions across diverse industries.

  • Monitor system performance, availability, and security using Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, and Application Insights.
  • Implement backup, disaster recovery, business continuity, and high availability solutions.
  • Design Azure SQL Database backup, restore, geo-replication, failover groups, and disaster recovery solutions.
  • Manage Azure Data Factory pipelines, ETL workflows, data movement, and integration between on-premises and cloud-based data sources.
  • Ensure compliance with security standards, governance policies, Azure Policies, and best practices.
  • Troubleshoot Azure infrastructure, networking, access control, and application hosting issues (L2/L3 support).
  • Collaborate with DevOps, Security, Development, and Database teams for project delivery.
  • Maintain technical documentation for cloud architecture, configurations, SOPs, and deployment processes.
  • Perform patch management, OS updates, vulnerability remediation, and system maintenance.

Technical Skills Required

  • 4+ years in Azure admin and Data Engineering, proficient in SQL and Azure products/services, with specialization in Azure's Data ecosystem.
  • Hands-on experience with Azure VMs, VNets, Subnets, NSG, Load Balancers, VPN Gateway, and Storage Accounts.
  • Experience managing Azure SQL Database, backup, restore, geo-replication, failover groups, and disaster recovery.
  • Proficiency in Azure Data Factory for ETL processes, pipeline creation, scheduling, and data integration.
  • Knowledge of Azure Blob Storage, Managed Disks, File Storage, backup retention, and storage optimization.
  • Experience with Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Application Insights, and performance monitoring tools.
  • Understanding of cloud security, governance, Azure Policies, compliance standards, and best practices.
  • Networking expertise in DNS, Firewall, VPN, VNet Peering, NSG, and Load Balancing.
  • Experience in cloud migration projects from on-premises to Azure.
  • Problem-solving skills for data-related issues.
  • Certifications: At least 1 or 2 mandatory (Microsoft Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104), Microsoft Azure Database Administrator Associate (DP-300), Microsoft Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203)).

Why Join Kott Software?

  • Global Impact: Work with agile organizations, Fortune 500 giants, and government agencies.
  • Career Growth: Exposure to advanced project management methodologies and quality processes.
  • Vibrant Culture: Flexible, high-energy environment valuing proactive contributions.
  • Competitive Rewards: Remuneration based on hands-on expertise.

Contact

For applications, email your resume to careers@kottsoftware.com.

As a Senior GenAI Developer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and integrating advanced Generative AI capabilities with security platforms and applying data science techniques to improve decision-making and automation.   • Develop scalable, secure backend services using .NET and/or Python ecosystems.

  • Ensure all AI integrations adhere to enterprise security, compliance, and governance standards.

  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps, including containerization with Docker and Kubernetes.

  • Experience with Dotnet/Python for AI prototyping or scripting.

Brief Description

We are seeking an experienced Cloud and Infrastructure Architect to lead enterprise-wide infrastructure strategy and implementation across public cloud platforms and on-premise data center technologies. This role requires an expert who can drive cloud adoption strategies, hybrid infrastructure design, seamless migration execution, and infrastructure security governance while aligning technical solutions with broader business and IT goals.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the development and execution of enterprise infrastructure strategies for public cloud, private cloud, and on-premise data centers.
  • Drive cloud adoption and migration programs, including assessments, migration planning, execution governance, and post-migration optimization.
  • Architect robust solutions across compute, storage, networking, virtualization, and enterprise security best standards.
  • Provide thought leadership and decision-making guidance on public cloud services, data center technologies, and emerging infrastructure trends.
  • Design and enforce strong infrastructure security practices, governance frameworks, and compliance adherence (e.g., GDPR, PCI DSS, HIPAA).
  • Collaborate with enterprise architecture, security, DevOps, application, and network teams to ensure cohesive infrastructure delivery.
  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives aimed at infrastructure scalability, automation, performance, and cost optimization.
  • Support pre-sales activities, including RFP/RFI responses, solution design, cost estimations, and client workshops.
  • Evaluate and manage partnerships with cloud providers, OEMs, and technology vendors to validate solution feasibility, strengthen service capabilities, and drive aligned GTM.
  • Develop and maintain technical documentation, accelerators, frameworks, and solution blueprints.

Preferred Skills

  • 15+ years of professional experience in IT infrastructure design, implementation, and operations, including 5+ years focused on cloud and data center architecture.
  • Proven track record in enterprise cloud migration projects, hybrid cloud strategy execution, and digital transformation initiatives.
  • Strong expertise in public cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), designing solutions using native services for compute, storage, networking, identity, security, and automation.
  • Strong background in data center technologies, including virtualization (VMware, Hyper-V), storage systems, network architecture, and infrastructure security.
  • Solid knowledge of containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes/OpenShift) supporting infrastructure modernization.
  • Strong understanding of IaC and automation tools such as Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation, ARM Templates.
  • Demonstrated expertise in security architecture and compliance, including identity management, network segmentation, and data protection.
  • Strong consulting and client engagement capabilities, assessments, solution presentations, and executive discussions.
  • Experience with enterprise monitoring, logging, and observability tools (Splunk, Prometheus, Grafana, New Relic).
  • Strong analytical skills with experience in cost assessment, TCO analysis, and infrastructure optimization for cloud and data centers.
  • Good experience in pre-sales, solution design, RFP responses, and deal support.

Application Instructions

Interested candidates may forward their detailed resumes to Careers@reflectionsinfos.com along with their notice period, current, and expected CTC details.

Important Notice: Reflections Info Systems does not charge any fees for job applications. Fraudsters may falsely promise jobs for a fee. All official communications are sent through the official HR email ID or LinkedIn. Contact Careers@reflectionsinfos.com for clarifications or alerts.
